meta.mercury_gui_note: limits_A and stats.limit_A for these pairs are bond distance limits measured/set in Mercury GUI. Lewis-engine uses limit_A directly (no P99 + 0.05 margin).
meta.tmqm_cutoff_formula: p99_A + 0.05 for stats with p99_A; limit_A as-is when stats.source == mercury_gui

Hg-H.note: Bond distance limit from Mercury GUI (tmqmg gap fill); used directly without P99 + 0.05 margin.
